name: Andijan
description: Andijan is the smallest region by area but densest in population (3.6M+) in the Fergana Valley — regional centre since 1941, GM plant, transport and culture. Ancient city, birthplace of Zahiruddin Muhammad Babur; oil and gas industry.

monuments.title: Bobur Park complex
monuments.info: Memorial to Babur on Bogishamol heights: house-museum, symbolic tomb, cableway, gardens and recreation.

monuments.title: Jome Mosque and madrasa
monuments.info: Late 19th c. (1870s–90s) ensemble of mosque, madrasa and minaret sponsored by Mahmud Aliboy; ~1.5–2 ha, 27–32 m minaret and carved iwan.

monuments.title: Khonabad resort and park
monuments.info: Spa in Khonabad on the eastern Fergana rim: iodine–bromine springs, cardiology, neurology, physiotherapy and salt therapy.

monuments.title: Imam-ota shrine
monuments.info: 18th c. pilgrimage site in Khojaabad District, state-protected since 1982; Imam Muhammad Hanafiy; mountain setting and tourism village status.

monuments.title: Mingtepa archaeological site
monuments.info: 4th–5th c. BC ruins in Marhamat — capital of ancient Davan, Ershi city; Silk Road crafts and farming centre; joint Uzbek–Chinese research since protection in 2019.
